reviews.review_title: Nothing! A bust! DOES NOT WORK! S3 user
reviews.review_description: Open Space is a worthless piece of crap! No goal except collecting space debris and going to the next planet. Who does this? THE GAME 'OPEN SPACE' IS WORTHLESS! THERE'S NOTHING TO DO WITH THIS GAME! I AM PROFANE WITH DISCUSS FOR THE DEVELOPER WASTING MY TIME! FU! DAYS OF CORRECTION MET NO REPLY = YOU AND YOUR GAME SUCKS TO HIGHEST HELL!STILL NOTHING! DUD! COLLECT SPACE DEBRIS END OF GAME! NEXT PLANET AND NEAREST PLANET ARE GAME GRAPHICS WITH NOTHING TO ACHIEVE! NOTHING! WHY? After collecting the crystals I returned to the shuttle and took control, lead to a planet... and there's nothing else. That's my game! Nothing happens. I hate whenever I play a game and mechanics is an issue before the game starts. What is taking the shuttle near, next, up-to, through whatever planet... I will do whatever the game wants at this planet that looks like a star BUT I CAN'T! NOTHING HAPPENS! I've been trying for some time to see how the game plays beyond steering the shuttle to a planet. Nothing happens... repeatedly. I DON'T GET IT!
this is actually a neat game an for free add better graphics there not bad but could be better.add functionality to all the buttons in the cockpit of the pilot then sell the game I'll buy it

Amazing experience with a lot of potential. I could have a lot of ideas it could swing a little bit more.
Strongly recommend to space dads as experience closer to ED to dream about or just relax for a while.
Graphics ok, controls ok, tutorial ok. 
Honestly more fun and immersive than Star Citizen ;) . o7

This game is the best but the Controls are weird But Still Cool! And Amazing!! 

(btw im making an animation for this So stay Tuned)
